headline: B2 Buzz protocol website, GitHub org, and documentation portal identified; no deployed contract addresses discovered.
short_headline: Protocol infrastructure located; addresses not enumerated

findings.text: Block-explorer name-tag search incomplete—search budget exhausted before querying etherscan.io, bscscan.com, polygonscan.com, and Bitcoin explorers for 'B2 Buzz', 'B2 Bridge', or 'BSquared Network' tags.
Official deployments documentation not located—fetched https://docs.bsquared.network homepage but no dedicated /deployments, /addresses, or /contracts page discovered.
No audit links provided in protocol context; no audit PDFs to parse.

GitHub deployment artifacts not enumerated—accessed https://github.com/b2network org page but did not walk into individual repos (b2-token-contract, cdk-validium-node, etc.) to search for broadcast/ or deployments/ subdirectories at pinned commit SHAs.
Multi-chain enumeration deferred—protocol.chains lists Bitcoin, Ethereum, Polygon, Binance, but block-explorer searches per chain were not completed.

rationale.verdict: Grade is 'unknown' because tool budget constraints and incomplete systematic exploration prevented enumeration of any deployed contract addresses. The protocol infrastructure (website, docs, GitHub org) has been verified to exist, but no on-chain addresses were discoverable within the search/fetch budget limits.

evidence.shows: Official protocol website accessible; product descriptions include B2 Hub, B2 Rollup, B2 Buzz (BTC-Fi yield product), U2 Stablecoin, and bridge/ecosystem links.

Official documentation portal live; navigation structure includes 'For Users' section with bridge reference at /for-users/bridge, indicating bridge contracts exist but no canonical address registry page found in this fetch.
Official GitHub organization with 41 repositories including b2-token-contract (Solidity), b2-zkevm-node (Go), cdk-validium-node (Go), and docs. Organization confirms active development.
Bridge user guide references https://www.bsquared.network/bridge/ as the official bridge frontend, but page content does not enumerate deployed contract addresses per chain.

unknowns: D1: Etherscan name-tag search for 'B2 Buzz' / 'BSquared Network' / 'B2 Bridge' on Ethereum mainnet not performed.
D1: BscScan name-tag search for Binance Smart Chain not performed.
D1: Polygonscan name-tag search for Polygon not performed.
D1: Bitcoin block explorer search not performed.
D2: Canonical 'Deployed Contracts' documentation page not located—D2-offchain.
D4: GitHub deployment artifact files (broadcast/, deployments/, addresses.json) not enumerated—tool budget exhausted—D4-offchain.
D5: Per-chain block-explorer enumeration incomplete—tool budget exhausted.
D6: No factory addresses discovered to enumerate child contracts.
D7/D8: Zero addresses successfully discovered and attributed.

protocol_metadata.about: B2 Buzz is BSquared Network's BTC-Fi yield product within their Bitcoin Layer 2 infrastructure. The protocol operates as a canonical bridge connecting Bitcoin, Ethereum, Polygon, and Binance Smart Chain to B2 Rollup (EVM-compatible L2) and B2 Hub (Layer 1.5), using zero-knowledge proofs and rollup architecture for scalability while maintaining Bitcoin security.
